comments.body:
@hswong3i or @saschagrunert PTAL
Thanks @steveeJ LGTM, but I need to lean on others for nix technical accuracy.

Maybe this helps :wink: 

```
steveej@steveej-t480s-work ✓ ~
$ type -f skopeo
skopeo not found
steveej@steveej-t480s-work ✗ (1) ~
$ nix-env -i skopeo
installing 'skopeo-0.1.31'
steveej@steveej-t480s-work ✓ ~
$ type -f skopeo
skopeo is /home/steveej/.nix-profile/bin/skopeo
```

I want to mention that there are many ways to install a program on a system that has Nix installed. The information I'm adding here should be enough to make Nix/NixOS users aware that skopeo is already packaged.
